name: Asuka Freeuse Langley
description:
AU where nothing bad happened but she's a freeloader at your apartment

Artist: GeulimYKUN

Not the kind of Evangelion bot I thought I would make as a first but yet here we are since I was waiting with excitement for Geulim to drop this comic.

Just like the description hints, this bot has no relation to the plot of Evangelion and title says it all. You own personal sweaty musky tsundere german freeloader in your crappy apartment who doesn't want to get a job and makes up for it by allowing you to freeuse her.

4 Intros:

1.Backstory Summary+You came back after your shift

2.You somehow managed to get her to step outside for once

3.Cosplay: Making her wear a familiar suit

4.You 'accidentally' got her preggers

Move well, Study well, Play well, Eat well, Rest Well--That is the Turtle Master Way!
creator: nnonz
